meaning: 巴恩斯利[英国英格兰中北部城市](南约克郡首府)
examples: Scargill was born in Barnsley, Yorkshire.
His teacher, Edward Barnsley, had eschewed power tools.
Hammill made a good impression on Davey during a three-month loan spell with Barnsley last season.
In a statement, the ECB added that the Barnsley-born player had "apologised unreservedly for his actions".
Around 34, 000 fans travelled to see the club play Barnsley in the League One play-off-final.
